sections.paragraph:
βῆμα, ατος, τό [βαίνω ‘walk’]

—1. ‘space covered by a movement of one foot ahead of the other’, pace, step οὐδὲ βῆμα ποδός not even a foot of ground Ac 7:5.

—2. ‘a dais/platform that requires steps for ascent’, of a speaker’s platform Ac 12:21, 23 v.l.; of a judicial bench/tribunal Mt 27:19 al.
